description: Generic Kotlin/JVM projects (backend/Ktor/CLI/etc) - NOT specifically mobile. An actual Android app also matches this (any *.kt file does) but additionally gets its own 'android' stack (see mobile/android.json, nested under the mobile/ direction) when AndroidManifest.xml is present - both fire together for a real Android project, which is fine, the plugin id is deduplicated.

plugins.description: Kotlin language server for code intelligence.

check._comment: How to verify the plugin is installed/available.

install._comment: Run ONE form to install. Do marketplace_add first if the marketplace is not added yet.
